subject: [DCAEGEN2] Update cm-container to 4.4.1
commit_message:
[DCAEGEN2] Update cm-container to 4.4.1

Updates k8splugin to use policy library compatible
with Python 3.

Issue-ID: DCAEGEN2-2662
Signed-off-by: Jack Lucas <jflos@sonoris.net>
Change-Id: I4b7eada28cc653690efe83c16e92323ee9041136
